ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "election_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election officer responsible for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling station */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the station is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the polling station */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the polling station */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the polling station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the polling station */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the polling station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_stations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_profile_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile change event */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter whose profile was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change made */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter who cast the vote */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "vote_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polling station where the vote was cast */,
  "voter_verification_method" TEXT /* Method used to verify the voter */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., absentee, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_votes_vote_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_location_id") REFERENCES polling_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the election was held */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., national, local) */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for voters */,
  "number_of_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of voters registered for the election */,
  "number_of_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the voter profile */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter whose profile was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_eligibility" (
  "eligibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eligibility status */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "eligible" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the voter is eligible to vote (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the eligibility status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the eligibility status was last updated */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Specific criteria used to determine eligibility */,
  "verification_method" TEXT /* Method used to verify eligibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eligibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter who submitted the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., ID card, proof of address) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the document has been verified (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "document_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the document */,
  "verification_method" TEXT /* Method used to verify the document */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date the document was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Value of the contact (e.g., phone number, email address) */,
  "primary_contact" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether this is the primary contact method (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_consents" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent (e.g., data sharing, communication) */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether consent was given (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date and time when consent was given */,
  "consent_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the consent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of flag (e.g., suspicious activity, fraud) */,
  "flag_details" TEXT /* Details of the flag */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the flag was raised */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the flag has been resolved (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the flag */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the flag was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., registration confirmation, voting reminder) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_details" TEXT /* Details of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method used to deliver the notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
